meta.title: Talk to Learn — Speak It. To Understand It.
meta.description: TalkToLearn — Speak It. To Understand It. A new way of learning by talking out loud. Pick any subject, speak under pressure, and AI scores your Clarity, Confidence, Relevance and Depth.

common.launchingSoonNote: Launching soon · Be first to know

hero.title: Talk to Learn
hero.subheadline1: You learn faster when you speak out loud.
hero.subheadline2: Pick any subject. Talk about it. AI scores your
hero.comprehensionBanner: The proven method that doubles comprehension — now powered by AI and available for any subject or certification.
hero.step1Desc: Pick anything — a certification, a topic, a skill. TalkToLearn tailors everything to you.
hero.step2Desc: AI builds your in-depth lesson, flashcards, and questions — your personal study plan, ready instantly.
hero.step3Desc: Speak under pressure. A live AI panel scores your Clarity, Confidence, Relevance and Depth.
hero.microcopy: Launching soon — join the early access list.
hero.trust: No credit card required · Any subject · Any level

why.title: Talking out loud activates the brain differently.
why.body: It strengthens memory, deepens understanding, and forces clarity. When you explain something verbally — especially under pressure — you learn faster and retain more.
why.highlight: Talk to Learn is built on this principle — AI that listens, scores, and helps you improve every time you speak.
why.researchLink: Backed by research — see the science
why.step1Body: The moment you explain out loud, your brain reorganises knowledge — making connections that passive reading never triggers.
why.step2Body: Gaps in understanding become instantly visible when you try to explain. Silence is feedback. The AI catches what you miss.
why.step3Body: Research shows learners who teach retain up to 90% more than those who only read or listen. Talking is the shortcut.
why.feynmanQuote: "The best way to learn something is to teach it."
why.taglineSub: A simple truth about how humans learn.

panel.title: Speak. Get scored. Learn faster.
panel.subtitle: Pick any subject. The panel asks real questions. You speak — and AI scores your clarity, confidence, relevance, and depth.
panel.ctaSubtitle: Launching soon — register your interest for early access.

qa.title: Panel Call Q&A
qa.subtitle: The panel will ask you 5 real questions. Answer out loud.
qa.chromeBadge: Best experienced in Chrome or Edge
qa.topicLabel: WHAT TOPIC SHOULD THEY GRILL YOU ON?
qa.topicPlaceholder: e.g. "My product idea" / "Climate change" / "My job application"
qa.generating: The panel is preparing their questions...
qa.firedQuote: R. Blake closes his notebook. "Next candidate."

who.title: Who It's For
who.subtitle: If you can speak, you can learn faster. It works for every subject, every level, every goal.
who.card1Title: Students who want to learn faster
who.card1Desc: Master any subject by explaining it out loud. Perfect for revision, exams, and real understanding.
who.card2Desc: Speak with clarity and conviction. Practise your pitch, meeting, or keynote — until it feels effortless.
who.card3Desc: Rehearse scripts, hooks, and lessons before you record. Hear yourself improve in real time.
who.card4Title: Anyone who learns better by talking
who.card4Desc: If reading and watching videos never quite sticks — talking it out loud is the method that actually works.
who.card5Title: People who want to build real confidence
who.card5Desc: Speaking under pressure — and being scored on it — is the fastest way to build the kind of confidence that lasts.
who.card6Desc: AWS · CompTIA · CFA · PMP — study the domains, test yourself out loud, and share your score. No more passive reading.
who.card7Desc: Give clients structured, measurable feedback on their speaking and thinking — backed by AI-powered scoring.
who.quote: "If you can say it, you know it."

testimonials.title: Real results from real learners.
testimonials.subtitle: Real stories from people who learned faster by talking out loud.
testimonials.t1Quote: TalkToLearn changed everything for me. My understanding of Azure Cloud Services improved dramatically — I can talk about it confidently for an hour now. Speaking it out loud made the concepts finally click.
testimonials.t2Quote: I passed my interview thanks to TalkToLearn. Practising under pressure made the real thing feel easy. I didn't just memorise answers — I understood what I was talking about.
testimonials.t3Quote: I used TalkToLearn to revise for my exams. Explaining topics out loud helped me remember them so much better. It's like the knowledge finally stuck.
testimonials.t4Quote: I rehearsed my presentation with TalkToLearn and it was a game-changer. Speaking under pressure helped me organise my thoughts and deliver with confidence.
testimonials.t5Quote: I've tried videos, books, and courses. Nothing helped me understand as quickly as talking out loud. TalkToLearn made me realise I learn best with my voice.
testimonials.t6Quote: Explaining my ideas out loud helped me refine them. TalkToLearn is now part of my creative process — it forces clarity.
testimonials.t7Quote: TalkToLearn has been incredible for my child. Their confidence has grown so much — they're speaking more clearly, explaining their ideas, and actually enjoying learning. Hearing them talk through topics out loud has been amazing. It's like their voice finally unlocked their understanding.
